raw.subject: Your Raleigh page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the playful post about smiling dogs on your page - it's a great way to showcase your personality and love for your furry clients.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on opportunities for customers to easily find and book your mobile grooming services.

I sketched up a simple homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook, featuring a hero headline about professional pet care in Raleigh and a clear call-to-action to book your services. The page also includes sections for your grooming services and a photo gallery of some of the adorable dogs you've worked with.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/kawaii-k9-mobile-grooming-llc-raleigh

I'd love to discuss how a simple website like this can help you reach more clients and grow your business - I offer a straightforward project fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to discuss further. A straightforward project fee for local businesses, with a simple flat rate for small businesses, can help you establish an online presence and reach more customers. reply or let's schedule a quick call.
